title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - October 24, 2023
section_path: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - October 24, 2023
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - October 24, 2023
summary:
Main
• What goes up, must come down. - Capesize rates probably have peaked for the year. Following considerable tightness in the Atlantic, Capesize spot rates touched 31,000 last week, a level that was unthinkable just a month ago.
